en: Monday's the day that you rest.
Monday you can party because you have to set it off right.
ko: 월요일에 파티 할 수 있어, 한 주를 제대로 시작해야 하니까.

en: I think Tuesday is the day for no partying.
ko: 화요일이 파티 안 하는 날인 것 같아.

en: Okay, I would say Monday and Tuesday,
that should be your taking a break.
I would say Monday feels wrong and Tuesday feels naughty.
ko: 월요일은 좀 그렇고 화요일은 좀 야해.

en: Isaac popping in with taco Tuesday, that is true.
Maybe the only good thing he's-
And Blake, is there a reason you don't have that tattoo across your belly?
ko: 근데 블레이크, 그 문신을 배에 안 한 이유가 있어?

en: Maybe the only good thing he's ever put in the chat.
